pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script generates the file at this exact path
Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly specify and check for these columns in the Scan_Data sheet

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on entirely synthetic vulnerability scan data generated at runtime by the setup script. The file is created at /home/ga/Documents/vuln_scan_results.xlsx. The agent is required to add seven specific columns: Environment, Impact, Base_Score, Exploit_Maturity, Team_Owner, Adjusted_Score, and SLA_Days, which are evaluated by the verifier.
